## Description
Provide a clear description of the changes made and the problem being solved. Include links to any related issues.

## Types of Changes
What types of changes does your code introduce? (Mark 'x' in the boxes that apply)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring / Code Quality Improvement
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style/eslint rules of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have tested that the local dev server compiles and runs without issues.
- [ ] The production bundle builds successfully (`npm run build`).
- [ ] I have verified that changes are responsive and render correctly on mobile devices.

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Add visual screenshots or recordings demonstrating the UI adjustments.
